title: Joint Agency Policy Statement: Supervisory Policy Statement Concerning a Supervisory Framework for Measuring and Assessing Banks' Interest Rate Risk Exposure
abstract: The OCC, the Board, and the FDIC (collectively, ``the agencies'') seek comment on a proposed interagency Supervisory Policy to establish a uniform supervisory framework for measuring banks' interest rate risk (IRR) exposures. The proposed policy establishes a framework that the agencies would use to measure and monitor the level of IRR at individual banks. The measurement process proposed and described in this policy statement is intended to facilitate the agencies' assessment of a bank's IRR ex
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
